relabelled_senses.definition: Literally: to increase mockery or scorn; used to indicate that something adds further humiliation or ridicule.

literal: no literal meaning

relabelled_senses.definition: Literally: for more 'INRI' (INRI being the inscription placed on Christ's cross); historically alludes to an added element of humiliation.

literal: no literal meaning

relabelled_senses.definition: Literally: for a sample, one button is enough; a small example suffices to illustrate the whole.

literal: no literal meaning
to stop or come to rest in an unfavorable place or situation
to split the difference; to reach a compromise by accepting a midpoint between two positions, offers, or amounts
to escalate or develop into a more serious, consequential, or intense situation
to experience financial hardship or economic difficulties
to spend time casually or leisurely; to pass the time
to circulate a hat or container among a group in order to collect voluntary monetary contributions or donations

relabelled_senses.definition: Literal reading: to experience the sufferings attributed to Cain (biblical reference), often used to emphasize the severity of the ordeal.

literal: no literal meaning

relabelled_senses.definition: Literal reading: to experience the difficulties associated with characters named Quico and Caco, used chiefly to convey the idea of going through a difficult or embarrassing situation.

literal: no literal meaning
to endure great hardship or difficulty; to have a very hard time
to suffer severely or endure extreme trouble; to go through a very difficult or punishing experience
to experience grave difficulties or danger; to go through a very bad or trying time

relabelled_senses.definition: Literally, a coarse expression whose literal words refer to 'spending them as whores'; used only idiomatically to convey intense difficulty or distress.

literal: no literal meaning

relabelled_senses.definition: Literal: literally 'to pass it well,' a word-for-word rendering of the verb and object pronoun that has no independent literal use apart from idiomatic senses.

literal: no literal meaning

relabelled_senses.definition: Literal: a playful, nonliteral phrase combining 'pasarlo' with 'bomba' ('bomb'), used only idiomatically to intensify the sense of enjoyment.

literal: no literal meaning

relabelled_senses.definition: Literal: literally 'to pass it in grand style,' a phrase whose literal wording is not used outside the idiomatic meaning of having a large or splendid time.

literal: no literal meaning

relabelled_senses.definition: To make a request that is inappropriate, futile, or unlikely to be fulfilled; literally, to ask for popcorn in the gulf (used figuratively for a misplaced or hopeless demand).

literal: no literal meaning
to ask for something impossible or unattainable; to make an unreasonable or excessive demand
